title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: It's not necessary for you to arrive early.
The film was so boring that I fell asleep.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that I fell asleep.

questions.firstSentence: She no longer plays the piano.
Nobody has repaired this machine for months.
You'll succeed only if you work hard.
She started working here ten years ago.
questions.secondSentence: She has been working here (1) _________ years.
